alkylation reagent: with a final concentration of 10 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: with a final concentration of 10 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with overnight at 37°C with 2 μg of sequencing-grade trypsin
collision energy: high-energy collision dissociation (32% normalized collision energy)
fragmentation method: submitted to high-energy collision dissociation (32% normalized collision energy)
instrument: analyzed online with a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: we performed a liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS)-based proteomic analysis
